title: Principal Frontend Developer at iGate India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at iGate India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
iGate India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About iGate India Global Group:
iGate India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India Global Group!
